pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh which explicitly checks for 'state university moodle' (case-insensitive) in the MySQL database.
Task description specifies LMS Type: Moodle and export_result.sh explicitly checks for 'moodle' (case-insensitive) in the MySQL database.
Task description specifies the exact URL 'https://moodle.stateuniversity.edu' and export_result.sh checks for 'moodle.stateuniversity.edu' in the MySQL database.
Task description specifies the client name and export_result.sh checks for 'seb-server-integration' in the MySQL database.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires setting up a synthetic LMS configuration in Safe Exam Browser Server. Verified through the task instructions and export script that the expected name is 'State University Moodle', expected type keyword is 'moodle', expected URL is 'https://moodle.stateuniversity.edu', and expected client name is 'seb-server-integration'. All verification is directly enforced via MariaDB queries executed in export_result.sh.
